<!--
Thanks for the contribution! Please keep PRs focused and see
CONTRIBUTING.md for the conventions.
-->

### What & why

What does this change, and why? Link any related issue (e.g. `Closes #12`).

### Checklist

- [ ] `make test`, `make race`, `make lint`, and `make vet` pass
- [ ] New or changed behavior has tests
- [ ] Public API changes are reflected in the README and `AGENTS.md`
- [ ] Shared mutable state stays safe under `-race`

### Notes

Anything reviewers should know - tradeoffs or follow-ups.
